status_detail: Signal-outcome pipeline is dormant (recorder inert pending entry/exit schema decision); 0 verified outcomes recorded to date. No win/loss figures are published until real outcomes exist — none are fabricated.

regime_analysis.note: Regime detector is live (composite RANGE_BOUND as of 2026-06-30T04:10Z), but regime-conditional accuracy requires verified outcomes tagged at fire time. None exist yet.

methodology: All signals are tagged with the market regime at generation time; win rate is computed per regime to show which conditions favor each signal type. No cherry-picking - all signals included. When zero verified outcomes exist, win rates are reported as null (not 0%) to avoid implying losses.
